date_approved: 2026-06-10 (Will: composition law approved with one pre-freeze amendment - scale-free DIV_AMPLIFICATION trigger; observable=selectable approved with consumer obligation; pow restriction approved with B4 route-fingerprint note; thresholds approved as frozen calibration candidates)
branch: campaign/exact-jet-primitive (based on Quiet HEAD 24690f6; main does not contain the Quiet artefacts - merge-ordering implication flagged for the report)

rulings_2026_06_10.option_b: Jet-level composition law approved: dual algebra on internal floats with a per-operation event accumulator; one TypedResult per evaluation (the Membrane Rule). No typed-scalar parent built.
rulings_2026_06_10.membrane_rule: Internal floats are lawful iff every dual operation feeds the accumulator and the boundary emits exactly one TypedResult - nothing crosses the membrane untyped.
rulings_2026_06_10.stable_schema: ExactJetValue/ExactJetResult is the consumer contract; Option-A migration changes internals only. Re-open trigger recorded: a consumer demonstrating per-op granularity need (candidate: separator M2 per-route provenance).
rulings_2026_06_10.placement: src/lloyd_v4/evals/exact_jet.py now; observers (L1.5) at promotion. Brief deliverable path corrected (authoring error, Will's note).
rulings_2026_06_10.composition_law: results/exact_jet_f1a_rerun/RESULT_TYPES_AMENDMENT_PROPOSAL.md - binding for this campaign once this manifest is frozen; applied to RESULT_TYPES.md only on Will's approval.

quiet_pin_reference.gate: the F1a re-run refuses to run unless sha256(quiet manifest) == pin (require_quiet_pin; test_quiet_rerun_gate.py). Fixtures, ladder, tolerances, arbiter policy are inherited from the Quiet manifest verbatim - F1a rungs k=0..15, tol 1e-3 relative, mpmath arbiter with dps escalation, dual-grading conventions.

predictions_verbatim_from_brief.P1: with the exact-jet route, I3 reads F1a kappa(delta) within 64 ulp-relative of I1's direct evaluation at every rung delta = 10^0 ... 10^-15.
predictions_verbatim_from_brief.P2: I3 retains its attribution property: zero unflagged confidently-wrong rungs (the flags adapt - fd_unresolved must no longer fire; any new floor must be flagged by a route-appropriate channel).
predictions_verbatim_from_brief.P3: the typed validity of each jet component is non-trivial (not vacuously valid): at least the conditioning channel must respond measurably across the ladder.
predictions_verbatim_from_brief.failure_handling_verbatim: Failure of P1 is filed as a formula-conditioning gap, not patched in-campaign. Failure of P2 is a defect (stop, fix, re-run). Failure of P3 is a design gap (stop, file).

prediction_grading_mechanical.P1: per rung k=0..15 (excluding the k where r_k == 2.0 exactly, a domain refusal for all instruments): |kappa_I3_jet - kappa_I1_direct| <= 64 * ulp(|kappa_I1_direct|), with kappa_I1_direct the Quiet manifest's pinned I1 operation order at the same binary operating point. PASS iff every rung satisfies the bound or both routes refuse identically.
prediction_grading_mechanical.P2: per rung: confidently-wrong = (validity selectable AND |I3 - arbiter| > 10*tol). UNFLAGGED iff additionally conditioning.status == WELL_CONDITIONED AND attribution channel == phenomenon AND no refusal. PASS iff zero unflagged confidently-wrong rungs AND fd_unresolved appears nowhere in the re-run records.
prediction_grading_mechanical.P3: PASS iff (a) condition_diagnostics.max_cancellation_binades at the deepest non-refused rung exceeds the k=0 value by >= 10 binades, (b) the per-rung sequence is nondecreasing in k (ties allowed), and (c) at least two distinct ConditioningStatus strata appear across the ladder. Predicted stratification (recorded, not graded): WELL -> WARNING near k=8 -> ILL near k=12 from the 1-2/r cancellation growing ~3.32k+1 binades.

i3_jet_route.definition: exact_jet of F(r) = log2|1 - 2/r| at the rung's binary r_k -> (S0, S1, S2) in one pass (S1 = gradient[0], S2 = hessian[0][0]); kappa via the HR129 multivariate reconstruction (identical formula to the Quiet I3, with exact jets replacing FD jets).
i3_jet_route.supersedes: the FD differencing path of substrate_invariant_search_phase_a_fd_metrology on the READING side only; the Phase A module remains the HR129 receipt generator and is not modified.

instrument_constants_declared.justification: see RESULT_TYPES_AMENDMENT_PROPOSAL.md section 4 - thresholds tied to mantissa half-width and the Quiet tol 1e-3. PRE-FREEZE AMENDMENT (Will ruling 1): DIV_AMPLIFICATION triggers on the MEASURED scale-free lane amplification (output-vs-input binade growth), not an absolute denominator threshold (the HR130 E-rule failure pattern); trigger and grading share one currency. Thresholds 26/40 + 60/150 are frozen calibration candidates (Will ruling 4): the predicted F1a stratification WELL->WARNING~k=8->ILL~k=12 is their test; misprediction = filed gap + reasoned v2, never an in-campaign retune.

identity_battery_frozen.multivariate: F(r,z,M) = 1 - 2M/r - z*z at the Quiet F1b k=0 point - H[1][1] must be exactly -2.0
identity_battery_frozen.degenerate: log at 0 and -1; sqrt at -4 and 0; abs at 0; x/(x-x); pow(-2, 0.5) - each must produce the proposal's exact typed refusal status, never an exception
identity_battery_frozen.tolerance: <= 8 ulp per jet component vs the analytic closed form (exact equality where the closed form is exactly representable)

oracle_crosscheck.tool: lv3_diagnose / lv3_observe_full on V3-expressible fixtures (sqrt/sin/exp/log/arithmetic grammar)
oracle_crosscheck.fixtures: the F1a surface 1 - 2/r - z*z (K_G + gradient comparison at shallow rungs k=0..2) and the F1b 3-var surface (principal curvature neighbour data)
oracle_crosscheck.tolerance: gradient components within 1e-12 relative where both expose them; disagreement recorded verbatim, never reconciled silently
oracle_crosscheck.role: oracle only (CLAUDE.md section 5) - V3 jets never shape the algebra

environment_pins.lloyd_v3_mcp: 1.27.0 via .mcp.json project scope (binary sha256 prefix e09bd3d873a30e752969)

determinism_policy: inherited from the Quiet manifest verbatim: zero RNG, canonical JSONL (sort_keys, repr floats), byte-stable re-runs diffed before commit, no wall-clock content in artefacts.

commands.green_slice: PYTHONPATH=src python -m pytest tests/test_jet_identities.py tests/test_jet_typed_composition.py tests/test_jet_oracle_crosscheck.py tests/test_jet_determinism.py tests/test_quiet_rerun_gate.py
commands.source_audit: PYTHONPATH=src python -m pytest tests/test_source_purity.py && grep -rn 'lloyd_v3\|lloyd_core\|hyperdual\|HyperDual\|torch' src/lloyd_v4/evals/exact_jet.py (must hit nothing - zero V3/OG imports or vocabulary)

non_goals_inherited: no eigensolve primitive; no separator work; no F3/wave-two; no substrate-tier promotion (eval-layer entry per DP4).
